translation.value: Name[COMMENT: default properties.xml; list header for any game object name - a game object is anything the user can interact with]

Follow/Unfollow[COMMENT: toggle subscription status]
News[COMMENT: toggle subscription status]
Click to set follow on/off[COMMENT: hint text describing what a particular button does, in this case toggling whether subscriptions are enabled or not]

Defensive Line[COMMENT:title for an area to choose defensive line options for the touchline instructions]
The lower the value the higher the defensive line[COMMENT: edit field for club defensive line tendency]
Fluidity[COMMENT: club attribute; how fluid a club's general playing style tends to be]
Free Roles
Lower values tend more towards zonal marking and higher values more towards player marking[COMMENT: AREA: tactics; NOTE: used to be man mark, made friendly for all modes of football]
Trigger Press[COMMENT: AREA: Tactics; SUB-AREA: Team Instruction descriptions; FR-BN: 34854; TONE: Formal; CHARLIMIT: None; REF-ID: n/a; NOTE: renaming Pressing Intensity]
Sitting Back
Use of Playmaker[COMMENT: tactical attribute]
Youth Rating[COMMENT: editor field for nation]
Economic Factor
FA Financial Power[COMMENT: comp editor; indicates the financial strength of a national FA]
Years To Gain Nationality[COMMENT: comp editor field]
Does Not Allow Dual Nationality[COMMENT: editor nation field]
Allow Multiple Assistant Managers[COMMENT: AREA: Editor; SUB-AREA: Best job role for a non player; TONE: Formal; CHARLIMIT: None; NOTE: editor nation field]
Max. Youth Age[COMMENT: advanced editor, details of the maximum age a player can be designated as a youth player in this country]
Foreign Manager Likelihood[COMMENT: editor field]
FA Patience[COMMENT: editor field]
Gain Nationality Type[COMMENT: do they have to live in the nation Continuously or is the time Accumulative]
